neighborhoods.name: Vilcabamba Centro
neighborhoods.description: Tiny Andean town in the Valley of Longevity with a central park, organic restaurants, and holistic health focus
neighborhoods.character: Tiny wellness village, organic lifestyle, spiritual

housing.predominantType: Small houses and apartments near the central park

neighborhoods.character_notes: The historic and commercial heart of Vilcabamba. Most walkable area with best access to cultural attractions, restaurants, and public services.

neighborhoods.name: Yamburara
neighborhoods.description: Valley area east of town with farms, horse ranches, and mountain river access
neighborhoods.character: Valley rural, farming, river access, peaceful

housing.predominantType: Farm houses, cabins, and rural properties

neighborhoods.character_notes: Established residential area offering a quieter lifestyle while maintaining reasonable access to Vilcabamba's center and services.

neighborhoods.name: Malacatos
neighborhoods.description: Adjacent valley town 20 minutes south with similar climate, local sugar cane production, and lower costs
neighborhoods.character_notes: More affordable option for budget-conscious retirees. May require a car or longer transit times to reach central amenities.

neighborhoods.name: Hacienda Zone / Upper Vilcabamba
neighborhoods.description: Hillside area above town where expats have built homes with panoramic valley views
neighborhoods.character: Expat hillside, valley views, alternative lifestyle

housing.predominantType: Custom eco-homes, hacienda-style houses, and retreats

neighborhoods.character_notes: Area with established international community and expat-oriented services. English is more commonly spoken here than in other neighborhoods.
